mapper.select: SELECT institution_id FROM sys_user_institution WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(order_amount), 0) as orderAmount FROM order_info WHERE 1=1
AND institution_id IN
#{id}
AND DATE(order_date) = CURDATE()

SELECT apply_status, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(apply_amount), 0) as amount FROM deposit_apply WHERE 1=1
AND institution_id IN
#{id}
GROUP BY apply_status

SELECT e.gender, COUNT(*) as count FROM elder_info e INNER JOIN elder_check_in ec ON e.elder_id = ec.elder_id WHERE ec.check_in_status = '1' AND e.status != '2'
AND ec.institution_id IN
#{id}
GROUP BY e.gender

SELECT CASE WHEN e.age BETWEEN 60 AND 69 THEN '60-70岁' WHEN e.age BETWEEN 70 AND 79 THEN '70-80岁' WHEN e.age BETWEEN 80 AND 89 THEN '80-90岁' WHEN e.age >= 90 THEN '90岁以上' ELSE '其他' END as ageGroup, COUNT(*) as count FROM elder_info e INNER JOIN elder_check_in ec ON e.elder_id = ec.elder_id WHERE ec.check_in_status = '1' AND e.status != '2'
AND ec.institution_id IN
#{id}
GROUP BY ageGroup ORDER BY ageGroup

SELECT ec.care_level, COUNT(*) as count FROM elder_check_in ec WHERE ec.check_in_status = '1'
AND ec.institution_id IN
#{id}
GROUP BY ec.care_level
